programmes.show_description: Amid disturbing events in the world's seas, scientists realise that an unknown species could threaten humanity. From the executive producer of Game of Thrones. (S1, ep 1)
The dog unit deals with a man who has barricaded himself in his house with his Rottweiler, while a woman who is thought to have overdosed disappears. (S5, ep 7)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 10)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 3)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 4)
A Brazilian man hiding a large quantity of cocaine is busted at Auckland Airport. Plus, a woman with undeclared seeds loses her cool with Biosecurity. (S11, ep 7)
Immigration deal with a Chinese national using a fake passport, while custom discover a huge stash of meth hidden among household items. (S11, ep 8)
In Central Otago, the highway cops tackle a motorist with an amusing excuse for his dangerous driving - he claims to be a Grand Prix champion. (S4, ep 1)
It's the Highway Cops vs the wildlife of New Zealand as a pony on the loose causes havoc, and a cattle truck flips and plunges livestock into a river. (S4, ep 2)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A man on the motorway inadvertently leads police to a bust. Plus, a sheep causes chaos when it runs amok. (S16, ep 19)
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S16, ep 20)
Suspicions about a convicted smuggler uncover a scam, and questions are raised when officers stumble upon a suitcase full of meat. (S2, ep 18)
While some engineering students carry out an unusual experiment, officers find a construction worker's story has no foundations. (S2, ep 19)

New. Cameras follow the men and women of the US border protection agencies as they uphold the country's much debated immigration policies. (S2, ep 5)

A troublesome taxi drivers keeps Customs and the police busy, while some solar lights arrive supercharged with drugs. (S12, ep 9)
Biosecurity New Zealand finds a hidden haul. Plus, Customs finds a picture worth a thousand words - and tens of thousands of dollars. (S12, ep 10)

Profit and Loss: Sisko and the Ops crew pull in a small, severely damaged Cardassian vessel containing three passengers - one of whom is Quark's long-lost love, Natima.
Chain Reaction: All at the SGC are shocked when General Hammond announces his retirement. (S4, ep 15)
Rising (Part 1 of 2): The first episode in this spin-off series from Stargate SG-1. Dr Elizabeth Weir steps through the gate to the Pegasus Galaxy and discovers Atlantis. (S1, ep 1)
Heart Of Glory: Lieutenant Worf must choose between his loyalty to Starfleet and his Klingon heritage when two Klingon fugitives take over the Enterprise.
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 3)
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 4)
Control: Officer Nolan discovers his confidential informant has gone back to her criminal ways. Lucy's friendship with Jackson is tested. (S2, ep 17)
Under the Gun: Officer Nolan and Harper are thrown into a scene of chaos when they escort four young offenders to a correctional facility. (S2, ep 18)
Silent Enemy: Attacked by an unidentified enemy ship, the crew struggles to get their new phase cannons operational. Meanwhile, Archer endeavours to give Reed a happy birthday. (S1, ep 12)
As whales attack tourists in Canada and lobsters turn deadly in France, a scientist discovers aggressive worms multiplying at speed. (S1, ep 2)
A trail of blood leaves officers puzzled, a man high on drink and drugs launches a tirade of abuse, and a domestic fight leads to an arrest. (S5, ep 8)
Documentary series charting the exploits of the City of London police, charged with safeguarding the Square Mile at the heart of the crime-ridden capital. (S4, ep 1)

Staff at Auckland Airport meet a Greek man with no money but a rich history, while Customs find jeans with more than just dodgy labels to hide. (S11, ep 9)
Customs deal with a Lithuanian man who has very questionable holiday plans and a risky item lands at the International Mail Centre. (S11, ep 10)
The Highway Cops step in when a reckless teen's speeding ends badly and a caravan loses a part at the top of the Lindis Pass. (S4, ep 3)
A fisherman finds himself in hot water and so does a drunk driver who can barely stand, as the Highway Cops continue their patrol of New Zealand's busiest roads. (S4, ep 4)

A teen's summer plans hit a roadblock and luxury items prove even more costly for a forgetful shopper. Meanwhile, a vagabond musician must prove his worth. (S2, ep 20)
A gun-carrying pleasure boat is examined by the marine team. Meanwhile, an unwise relationship could cause heartache for a would-be tourist. (S2, ep 21)

Blood Oath: Three aged Klingon warriors arrive to fulfil a blood oath they made with Dax decades ago, to kill a man known as the Albino.
2010: Ten years have passed since an alien race known as the Aschen saved Earth and cured cancer but Carter discovers the awful truth behind this seemingly infallible race. (S4, ep 16)
Rising (Part 2 of 2): Unable to return to Earth, the crew looks for a new fuel source. They happen upon a settlement, but the villagers live in fear. The enemy is coming. (S1, ep 2)
The Arsenal of Freedom: The Enterprise travels to the legendary world of Minosa, but the crew find themselves under attack by a highly sophisticated weapons system.

William Devin Howell: Take an in-depth look at the life and crimes of William Devin Howell who was found guilty of the murders of seven different women. (S9, ep 2)
Sinead Wooding: The story of a young wife and mother-of-four, murdered ferociously by her controlling husband and an accomplice.
Dear Doctor: The crew discovers a new planet with two races, one in desperate need of medical and scientific assistance. (S1, ep 13)
